calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-10-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioners: Paul W. Aparicio, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Mario Antonio Judkins, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Petition need to be filed in proper county.
Petition for Change of Name of a Minor is DENIED without prejudice.
Denial of request for decree changing name signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-10-2005 Text Ruling
